seo.title: 204 Ivy Cottage Dr, Youngsville, LA 70592 — For Sale $1,510,000
seo.meta_description: For Sale: 204 Ivy Cottage Dr, Youngsville, LA 70592. Single-Family — 4 bed, 3.5 bath, 3,918 sq ft. Offered at $1,510,000. Presented by Carrie Billeaud, REALTOR®, eXp Realty.
seo.og_title: 204 Ivy Cottage Dr, Youngsville, LA 70592 — For Sale $1,510,000
seo.og_description: Single-Family — 4 bed / 3.5 bath / 3,918 sq ft. Offered at $1,510,000. Presented by Carrie Billeaud, REALTOR®, eXp Realty.

copy.hero_tagline: White brick, slate, and quiet confidence on nearly half an acre in Youngsville.
overview_paragraphs: Completed in 2026, this single-family residence answers scale with restraint. A white brick facade rises to a gray slate roof, its line broken by three dormer windows and, below, a trio of tall arched openings framed in black. Metal lanterns mark the entry, and the composition reads as deliberately traditional rather than merely new.

Behind the symmetry are 3,918 square feet arranged across four bedrooms and three and a half baths, with a three-car garage set discreetly into the plan. The 0.45-acre lot gives the house room to breathe, its proportions holding their own against the surrounding landscape.
Boxwood hedges, flowering shrubs, and a clipped green lawn edge a concrete walkway to the door — a grounds treatment as measured as the architecture it introduces.
copy.pull_quote: Three arched windows, three dormers, one slate roofline — a house composed rather than assembled.

feature_groups.title: Architecture & Facade
items: White brick exterior beneath a gray slate roof
Three dormer windows along the roofline
Three tall arched windows with black frames on the main level

feature_groups.title: New Construction, 2026
items: Four bedrooms and three and a half baths
3,918 square feet of single-family living space

feature_groups.title: Grounds & Approach
items: Concrete walkway to the front entry

location_paragraphs: The residence sits on Ivy Cottage Drive in Youngsville, a community in Louisiana's Acadiana region within Lafayette Parish. The setting is suburban and unhurried, with the greater Lafayette area a short drive to the north.
Youngsville offers the amenities of a growing Acadiana town while keeping the open, low-density character that a near-half-acre lot depends on.
Positioned in the 70592 area, the property is convenient to the roadways connecting Youngsville to Lafayette and the wider region.
location_points: Located in the Acadiana region of south Louisiana
Short drive to the greater Lafayette area
Access to regional roadways linking Youngsville and Lafayette
copy.cta_sub: 204 Ivy Cottage Drive is shown by appointment. To walk the grounds and see the home for yourself, contact Carrie Billeaud at eXp Realty — 337-258-5379.

media.hero_alt: Front facade of white brick house with gray slate roof and three dormer windows. Features three large arched windows on main level with black frames and metal lanterns. Landscaped yard with green lawn, flowering shrubs, boxwood hedges, and concrete walkway.
